source.detail: "300 133.6 59.4 64.3 84.1 153.7 134.1 97.0 53.4" (table, p. 19). Consistent with the map's contract_bulk_modulus identity: (C11 + 2 C12)/3 = (133.6 + 2*59.4)/3 = 84.1 GPa. Elastic moduli and thermal conductivity of quantum materials at finite temperature (Folkner, Barbalinardo et al.), 2024
